criteria.criterion: Glob expansion: ls *.ts returns matching files
Glob expansion: cat *.txt concatenates matching files — test in glob-expansion-m17.test.ts passes
Glob expansion: rm *.log removes all matching files — test passes
Glob expansion: cp *.md /dest/ copies all matching files — test passes
Glob expansion: no-match returns 'No such file or directory' error
cp without -r on directory returns 'cp: <path>: is a directory' — implemented via ls guard in cp()
cp -r dir/ dest still works correctly
Input redirection: grep pattern < file.txt reads file and filters lines
Input redirection: wc < file.txt counts from file content
Input redirection: grep pattern < nonexistent returns error with exitCode 1
Input redirection: cmd < infile > outfile combined works
Test count gate >= 155 — cannot verify without running tests
Coverage gate: statement >= 80%, branch >= 75% — cannot verify without running tests
